items.title: Kane bereikt mijlpaal van 500 goals, Leverkusen dankt Poku tegen St. Pauli
items.summary: Bayern München heeft het gat met Borussia Dortmund weer vergroot tot zes punten. Dat had de club zaterdagmiddag te denken aan Harry Kane, die tegen Werder Bremen zijn 500ste profdoelpunt maakte. Bij Bayer Leverkusen was Ernest Poku belangrijk.

items.title: VI Live: Heracles en NAC vermaken nog niet, Vitesse aan de leiding tegen VVV
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-duels op het programma. Voor Ajax tegen Fortuna Sittard is er een apart liveblog, voor de rest kun je terecht in deze VI Live. En uiteraard ook voor het belangrijkste voetbal in het buitenland.

items.title: Veelbesproken Ronaldo maakt na twee weken rentree voor Al-Nassr
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo maakt zaterdag zoals verwacht zijn rentree bij Al-Nassr. De 41-jarige Portugees miste de afgelopen twee competitieduels wegens een staking.

items.title: Bejubelde Summerville koestert zijn specialiteit: 'Met mijn flair in de één tegen één…'
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville heeft zaterdagmiddag nog maar eens de hoofdrol opgeëist bij West Ham United. De matchwinner werd na het FA Cup-duel met Burton Albion uitgeroepen tot Man van de Wedstrijd. In de Engelse media kreeg de 24-jarige Nederlander opnieuw veel lof.

items.title: 'Brazilië praat met Ancelotti, Lewandowski wil snel duidelijkheid'
items.summary: We zitten in een periode tussen twee transferwindows, maar de stroom aan transfernieuws houdt nooit op. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Below-par West Ham edge past Burton in FA Cup after extra-time
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville spared West Ham’s blushes as he came off the bench to score an extra-time winner against League One Burton and put Nuno Espirito Santos’ side into the FA Cup last 16 with a 1-0 victory.

items.title: Summerville strike earns 10-man West Ham extra-time FA Cup win at Burton
items.summary: For West Ham’s second string, barring a shock defeat this could barely have been a more uncomfortable afternoon. With Jarrod Bowen, the captain, among a clutch of regulars given a breather, it was Crysencio Summerville, a late substitute Nuno Espírito Santo would have rather kept fresh, who spared embarrassment at Burton Albion and helped them into the FA Cup fifth round. Four years ago at Kidderminster, in this competition, it was Declan Rice who came on to save their skins and it was a similar story here, Summerville’s extra-time strike preventing penalties. West Ham squeezed through, Freddie Potts’s red card 11 minutes into extra time for crunching into the Burton substitute Julian Larsson ensuring a nervy finale, in which another sub, Kain Adom, skittled a stoppage-time shot against the side-netting. For Gary Bowyer, Burton’s colourful head coach who was wearing boxing gloves when he greeted his squad in the dressing room, a nod to a theme adopted through this Cup run, they almost landed a knockout blow. Continue reading...

items.title: Tottenham appoint Igor Tudor as new head coach
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur have appointed Igor Tudor as their new head coach, the club have confirmed.

items.title: Wrexham into FA Cup last 16 for 1st time since '97
items.summary: Wrexham achieved another landmark moment in their meteoric rise after reaching the last 16 of England's FA Cup for the first time since 1997.

items.title: PSG stunned by coachless Rennes in title blow
items.summary: Coachless Rennes stunned Ligue 1 leaders Paris Saint-Germain 3-1 at home and snapped a five-game winless run on Friday.

items.title: Pulisic comes off bench as Modric gives Milan win
items.summary: Luka Modric scored a late winner for AC Milan to beat Pisa 2-1 and close the gap on Serie A leader Inter Milan to five points on Friday.

items.title: Hull confirm arrests over chanting vs. Chelsea
items.summary: Hull City have confirmed there were multiple arrests made for discriminatory chanting during Friday's 4-0 FA Cup fourth round defeat to Chelsea.

items.title: Blackburn, Millwall & Derby lead - EFL LIVE!
Ireland's replacements provide vital impact in comeback win vs Italy
items.summary: Ireland's replacements saw them kick on to a 20-13 comeback victory over Italy in Round 2 of the Six Nations, avoiding what would have been a first ever loss to the Azzurri in Dublin.

items.title: ‘It is an honour’: Tottenham confirm Igor Tudor as interim head coach until end of season
items.summary: Former Juventus head coach replaces Thomas Frank Croatian’s priority to ‘improve our results quickly’ Igor Tudor has been announced as Tottenham’s interim head coach on a deal until the end of the season. Spurs dismissed Thomas Frank on Wednesday after a dismal display in a 2-1 defeat at home to Newcastle a day earlier left the club in 16th position and only five points above the Premier League relegation zone. Continue reading...

items.title: 'It meant everything to me!' | Weston elated with taking gold in skeleton

items.title: Smith & Terland feature in UWCL best goals
